sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root הָפַךְ), pr. twisting, distortion, i.e. the stocks, in which the hands and feet of a prisoner were so fixed that his body was distorted (worin jemand krumm gefchloffen wurde). Compare סַד and Scheid, in Diss. Lugdd. page 968; Jer 20:2, Jer 20:3 29:26 . 2Ch 16:10, בֵּית הַמַּהְפֶּכֶת “the house of the stocks,” a prison.

I.
